final_prompt.prompt:
Generate a YouTube thumbnail for Marvel's Spider-Man 2.

风格/媒介: AAA video game thumbnail style, anime-inspired, polished and cinematic, high energy
构图:
  角色居中前景，crossed-arm pose，floating seated position
  背景为夜间纽约城市天际线
  画面一侧放置粗体超大文字
  Venom 与另一个 Spider-Man 剪影隐约出现在角色身后
主体:
  参考图 #1 中的肌肉型战士角色，重新设计为 Spider-Man 形象
  保留：muscular build、crossed-arm pose、floating seated position、sharp eyes、high brown ponytail、giant sword on his back
  战衣改为 sleek black-and-red Spider-Man symbiote-style suit，胸口有 glowing white spider emblem
  战衣加入 subtle web textures 与 futuristic armored details
  表情 intense and confident
场景/背景: 夜间纽约城市天际线，lightning、glowing neon lights、destroyed streets、Spider-Man 2 action elements
光线/氛围:
  dramatic shadows，glowing highlights
  blue and red lighting effects
  motion blur、sparks、smoke
色彩方案: highly saturated，strong contrast，black and red dominant，glowing accents
材质/纹理: symbiote suit texture，web pattern，futuristic armor plating
文字(原样): PART 1
约束:
  整体风格参照 official Marvel's Spider-Man 2 YouTube thumbnail
  maximum click-through appeal
避免: flat lighting, muted colors, plain background

error: 重试 10 次仍失败 · 最后:生图失败
